Title: User Community
QuerySelect:
SELECT 
    uc.UserID,
    u.Username,
    STRING_AGG(CAST(uc.CommunityID AS VARCHAR(20)), ',') AS CommunityID
FROM UserCommunity uc
INNER JOIN Users u ON u.UserID = uc.UserID
GROUP BY uc.UserID, u.Username
ORDER BY u.Username
QueryInsert:
DECLARE @lidRid INT = (SELECT RoleID FROM Roles WHERE RoleName = 'Lid' AND PortalID = 0);
INSERT INTO UserCommunity (UserID, CommunityID, RoleID)
SELECT CAST(@UserID AS INT), CAST(value AS INT), @lidRid
FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommunityID, ',')
WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(value)) <> '';
IF @lidRid IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM UserRoles WHERE UserID = CAST(@UserID AS INT) AND RoleID = @lidRid)
  INSERT INTO UserRoles (UserID, RoleID, CreatedOnDate, LastModifiedOnDate, Status, IsOwner)
  VALUES (CAST(@UserID AS INT), @lidRid, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), 1, 0)
QueryUpdate:
DECLARE @lidRid INT = (SELECT RoleID FROM Roles WHERE RoleName = 'Lid' AND PortalID = 0);
DELETE FROM UserCommunity WHERE UserID = CAST(@pk AS INT);
INSERT INTO UserCommunity (UserID, CommunityID, RoleID)
SELECT CAST(@UserID AS INT), CAST(value AS INT), @lidRid
FROM STRING_SPLIT(@CommunityID, ',')
WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(value)) <> '';
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM UserCommunity WHERE UserID = CAST(@pk AS INT))
  BEGIN IF @lidRid IS NOT NULL DELETE FROM UserRoles WHERE UserID = CAST(@pk AS INT) AND RoleID = @lidRid END
ELSE IF @lidRid IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM UserRoles WHERE UserID = CAST(@pk AS INT) AND RoleID = @lidRid)
  INSERT INTO UserRoles (UserID, RoleID, CreatedOnDate, LastModifiedOnDate, Status, IsOwner)
  VALUES (CAST(@pk AS INT), @lidRid, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), 1, 0)

Columns.Label: Naam
Columns.Pattern: SELECT u.UserID, u.Username FROM Users u INNER JOIN UserPortals up ON up.UserId = u.UserID WHERE up.PortalId = 0 AND u.UserID NOT IN (SELECT UserID FROM UserCommunity) ORDER BY u.Username

Columns.Label: Community
Columns.Pattern: SELECT CommunityID, Name FROM Community ORDER BY Name
